item.title: 春ばんちょー🐧⚡️#轟はじめ #hololive #illustration #shorts #regloss
item.author: Riko vlog

item.title: WATCHALONG - Nintendo Direct SWITCH 2 REVEAL (and please forgive me)
item.author: hwikky
item.content:encoded:
Please forgive me. I see that Kiara and a few other hololive members are doing watchalongs as well. But I have been waiting a long time to do a watchalong stream of my own for a new Switch since it will be another 7 or 8 years until the next one.
✨ Feel free to prioritize the hololive members' streams over mine. Takanashi Kiara - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MTI8pMHdhUI Hakui Koyori - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cvWuNiNdZCI Inugami Korone- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0xHIVSXPNEc HOLOSTARS - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D_-YC6mRZNI
⭐ Please follow and support! ⭐ フォローとサポートはこちらへ！ ⭐ 팔로우와 후원은 여기로! Twitter - https://twitter.com/hwikkyofficial Patreon - https://www.patreon.com/hwikky ko-fi - https://www.ko-fi.com/hwikky StreamLabs - https://streamlabs.com/hwikky/tip
#NintendoSwitch2 #NintendoDirect

item.title: Unboxing the Kazama Iroha figure by Claynel
item.author: Linsaloty
item.content:encoded:
Find me on X: https://twitter.com/linsaloty BGM: "Cradle" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks Hololive goods and haul playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZA05Mx0fct4reBt9faUqqR1gBYMpPk4l

item.title: Visiting the ReGLOSS Cafe & Hololive Valentine Exhibition
item.author: Linsaloty
item.content:encoded:
Find me on X: https://twitter.com/linsaloty BGM: "Get-Ready" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks Hololive event/collab vlog playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZA05Mx0fct5KQkT5pLgMt7m4rtRiKcLl
▼Related Videos▼ Visiting the MiKorone Temple and Sonic Korone Cafe: https://youtu.be/BdyVIQGBzbE Ririka Poppy Playtime: https://www.youtube.com/live/ngygMeErwhw?si=ebpF45xxoOyzgepH AZKi & Iroha real life Geoguessr: https://youtu.be/7iFpWrSkBi8?si=wjrHefsVEYYloQI9
Regloss cafe: https://www.sweets-paradise.jp/collaboration/regloss_cho_verybar Hololive Valentine ~Message for You~: https://www.hmv.co.jp/en/news/article/241209179/
Timestamps 0:00- ReGLOSS collab cafe 3:45 - Hololive Valentine Exhibition 12:52 - Hololive Myth Mini Exhibition(?) 17:05 - Goods 24:45 - Final thoughts

item.title: MY BEST JAPAN TRIP SO FAR【2025 HOLOLIVE SUPER EXPO VLOG】 PART 1
item.author: Gordon Yeung
item.content:encoded:
Hololive events are such a joy as always. Made so many new friends and I can't wait to meet you all at the next one.
▽There's more info underneath▽ ▶IG:gordonyeung314

item.title: ENG | オタ活 vlog 》ホロライブEXPOフェス参戦🏃‍♀️みこちの応援うちわ制作📣hololivefesEXPO25_DAY2🎉CREATORS'STAGE / Stage3参戦🌸
item.author: Riko vlog
item.content:encoded:
ご視聴いただきありがとうございます🤍 来年こそEXPOもfesもいけたらいいな🙃
✧ 翻訳・文章添削 Mちゃん
✧ BGM / @kyattoworks / @nogika_chaba / @sari_bgm / 効果音ラボ様
#hololivefesEXPO25 #さくらみこ #Sakuramiko #オタ活 #Hololive

item.title: So I lost half of my Hololive oshi...
item.author: Linsaloty
item.content:encoded:
To those who reached out, thank you I appreciate it! Give your nearby Shiokko love if you see them at EXPO/Fes!
Also watching back I sound so sad haha. Don’t worry I am fine!(End of the day so my energy was drained!) As hard as it is, I’m genuinely happy for Shion that she was able to make the best choice herself. I do wish her the very best in whatever she pursues! Maybe we will get more Aqushio or Shioshachi if she ever decides to reincarnate!
Like everyone always says, treasure your time you have with your oshi cause you may never know when it will end!
Find me on X: https://twitter.com/linsaloty
▼Related Videos▼ Gomen Medicine MV: https://youtu.be/eKA6dewIdk8?si=OgIPcral-gVdf1zG Cinderella Magic MV: https://youtu.be/IdgsvGvm_Fc?si=dN06hyQEQ3Ejorws
Timestamps 0:00 - My oshi situations in 2024 4:00 - Shion 8:54 - Thoughts on Hololive/Cover 13:25 - My updated oshi rankings 16:59 - Final thoughts
